author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Two bugs reported: 1) PTX recompilation on every kernel call — ctx.load_module(Ptx::from_src(...)) compiles PTX→CUBIN every time, 1700us overhead per call. Fix: cache compiled modules. 2) Softplus not differentiable — blocks Forward-Forward training. Fix: make Softplus use autograd. Dispatching both.
